inputs.label: Total Storage Area
inputs.businessContext: Total floor area dedicated to storage. Based on WERC warehouse measurement standards.

inputs.label: Usable Storage Area
inputs.businessContext: Area actually used for storage after aisles, offices, etc. Typically 70-85% of total area per lean principles.

inputs.label: Average Inventory Value
inputs.businessContext: Average value of inventory held. Used for cost of capital calculation.

inputs.label: Annual Storage Cost per m²
inputs.businessContext: Includes rent, utilities, maintenance. Benchmark from industry reports (e.g., CBRE).

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Average warehouse worker wage including benefits. Based on Bureau of Labor Statistics.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per m² per Year
inputs.businessContext: Labor intensity for storage activities. Derived from time studies (Maynard).

inputs.label: Equipment Cost per Year
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost of forklifts, racking, etc. Includes depreciation and maintenance.

inputs.label: Cost of Capital Rate
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC). Used for inventory carrying cost. Standard finance.

inputs.label: Storage Utilization Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of usable space actually occupied. Lean target >85%.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects output adjustment.

hiddenLossDrivers: if storageUtilizationRate < 60 then 'Low utilization indicates wasted space'
if annualInventoryCarryingCost > 0.3 * totalAnnualStorageCost then 'High inventory carrying cost relative to total'
suggestedActions: if storageUtilizationRate < 75 then 'Improve layout or reduce aisle space to increase utilization'
if annualLaborCost > 0.4 * totalAnnualStorageCost then 'Consider automation to reduce labor cost'
if annualInventoryCarryingCost > 0.2 * totalAnnualStorageCost then 'Review inventory levels and implement JIT'
